rawOutput:
<Form onSubmit="submitBooking">
  <Column>
    <Text variant="heading">预约服务</Text>
    <Select bind="serviceType" options="services" required />
    <Input type="text" placeholder="选择日期" bind="bookingDate" required />
    <Input type="text" placeholder="选择时间" bind="bookingTime" required />
    <Input type="text" placeholder="备注" bind="notes" />
    <Row>
      <Button variant="primary" onTap="submitBooking">提交预约</Button>
      <Button variant="secondary" onTap="cancel">取消</Button>
    </Row>
  </Column>
</Form>
